query: SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND (TABLE_NAME LIKE '%ops%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%scan%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%log%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%finding%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%vuln%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%llm%') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2k2SuDvpDb6F44q.5f28f8362a85 --database VmWWcXQYZJYuALRdNNvsC2 --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND (TABLE_NAME LIKE '%ops%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%scan%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%log%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%finding%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%vuln%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%llm%') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME
